title: e2e: use ExitCleanly() in checkpoint tests
body:
Ongoing steps toward RUN-1907: replace Exit(0) with ExitCleanly()

Clean command-line replace, with one manual reversion (commented)

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: @cevich what is going on with the windows installer, agent is failing.  we need it working.
